A) A = dorsiventral, B = upright, slender
axes, C = alternally
B) A = isobilateral, B = upright, slender
axes, C = spirally
C) A = dorsiventral, B = isobilateral axes,
C = alternately
D) A = dorsiventral, B = upright, slender
axes, C = spirally
123. Embryophytes doesn’t includes
A) Algae, Bryophytes (Pg42, E)
B) Bryophyte, Pteridophytes
C) Gymnosperm, angiosperm
D) Algae only
124. Double fertilization does not occur in —
(Pg42, E)
A) Pteridophyte, some gymnosperm,
B) Monocot, dicot
C) Dicot, some gymnosperm
D) Bryophytes, pteridophyte, some
gymnosperm & monocot
